name: Jane Doe
paragraphs: Opening paragraph — hook the reader with something specific about the company and the role. Reference a real product, campaign, or announcement.
Proof paragraph — 2-3 concrete examples from your background mapped to the role's top requirements. Use numbers.
Differentiator paragraph — the unique perspective or combination of skills you bring that other candidates likely don't.
Close — enthusiasm and a clear next step. No groveling.
